meaning: n.沙特阿拉伯的货币单位,里亚尔
examples: The Yemeni rial or Yemeni riyal is the currency of Yemen.
The Qatari riyal (currency code QAR) is the official currency of Qatar.
The riyal has been fixed against the US dollar at about 3.64 to 1 since 1980.
One sterling idea was to buy silver riyal coins and melt them down into ingots.
Ambani had noticed that the riyal exchange to the British pound was lower than its worth on the silver market.
